grass_orange.description: Warm orange sand with texture — rows 0-5 left of TilesetFloor

grass_lime.description: Light/lime green grass — rows 7-13 left half of TilesetFloor

grass_white.description: Grey cobblestone — rows 14-19 left of TilesetFloor

grass_green.description: Dark green grass — rows 7-13 right half of TilesetFloor

grass_pink.description: Warm peach/salmon terrain — rows 0-5 right of TilesetFloor

grass_grey.description: Grey earth — rows 14-19 right base of TilesetFloor

earth_dark.description: Warm brown earth — rows 14-19 right fill of TilesetFloor

earth_brown.description: Dark brown dirt — pairs with dark_grass in transitions

earth_light.description: Light brown earth — pairs with light_grass in transitions

earth_wet.description: Dark wet earth (melted ice) — rows 20-25 right of TilesetFloor

sand.description: Smooth light orange sand — rows 0-5 left of TilesetFloor

snow.description: White/off-white snow ground — shared secondary terrain for stone, ice, and wet earth

ice.description: Light blue ice — rows 20-25 left of TilesetFloor

tree_tall_green.description: Tall green tree with visible trunk
